title: The Tumultuous Tom-tommy Tortoise
content:
The Tumultuous Tom-tommy Tortoise,
    who beat a Drum all day long in the
    middle of the wilderness.
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Tumultuous Tom-tommy Tortoise"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
